'''âs-l-z''' ('''salaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:experimentalize|experimentalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:experimentalize|experimentalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| salaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazithi|salazithi]] || [[word:salaziji|salaziji]] || [[word:salazishi|salazishi]] || [[word:salazi|salazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazuthuth|salazuthuth]] || [[word:salazujuj|salazujuj]] || [[word:salazushush|salazushush]] || [[word:salaz|salaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazuthu|salazuthu]] || [[word:salazuju|salazuju]] || [[word:salazushu|salazushu]] || [[word:salazu|salazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazufuth|salazufuth]] || [[word:salazufuj|salazufuj]] || [[word:salazufush|salazufush]] || [[word:salazuf|salazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazethe|salazethe]] || [[word:salazeje|salazeje]] || [[word:salazeshe|salazeshe]] || [[word:salaze|salaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazothoth|salazothoth]] || [[word:salazojoj|salazojoj]] || [[word:salazoshosh|salazoshosh]] || [[word:salaz|salaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazotho|salazotho]] || [[word:salazojo|salazojo]] || [[word:salazosho|salazosho]] || [[word:salazo|salazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazofoth|salazofoth]] || [[word:salazofoj|salazofoj]] || [[word:salazofosh|salazofosh]] || [[word:salazof|salazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazĂŠthĂŠ|salazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:salazĂŠjĂŠ|salazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:salazĂŠshĂŠ|salazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:salazĂŠ|salazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazathath|salazathath]] || [[word:salazajaj|salazajaj]] || [[word:salazashash|salazashash]] || [[word:salaz|salaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazatha|salazatha]] || [[word:salazaja|salazaja]] || [[word:salazasha|salazasha]] || [[word:salaza|salaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazafath|salazafath]] || [[word:salazafaj|salazafaj]] || [[word:salazafash|salazafash]] || [[word:salazaf|salazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:salazasha|salazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosalazasha|gosalazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisalazasha|gokisalazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:salaznĂŒsha|salaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosalaznknĂŒsha|gosalaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisalaznĂŒsha|gokisalaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:salazshĂ«sha|salazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosalaznkshĂ«sha|gosalaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisalazshĂ«sha|gokisalazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazrosha|salazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalaznkrosha|gosalaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazrosha|gokisalazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:salazmusha|salazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalaznkmusha|gosalaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazmusha|gokisalazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:salazsherasha|salazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosalaznksherasha|gosalaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisalazsherasha|gokisalazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:salazngasha|salazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosalaznkngasha|gosalaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisalazngasha|gokisalazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:salazyasha|salazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosalaznkyasha|gosalaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisalazyasha|gokisalazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:salazyamasha|salazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosalaznkyamasha|gosalaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisalazyamasha|gokisalazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:salaznĂŒshĂ«sha|salaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosalaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisalaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salaznĂŒrosha|salaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalaznknĂŒrosha|gosalaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalaznĂŒrosha|gokisalaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salaznĂŒmusha|salaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalaznknĂŒmusha|gosalaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalaznĂŒmusha|gokisalaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazshĂ«nĂŒsha|salazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosalaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisalazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazshĂ«rosha|salazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalaznkshĂ«rosha|gosalaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazshĂ«rosha|gokisalazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salazshĂ«musha|salazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalaznkshĂ«musha|gosalaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazshĂ«musha|gokisalazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazronĂŒsha|salazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalaznkronĂŒsha|gosalaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazronĂŒsha|gokisalazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:salazroshĂ«sha|salazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalaznkroshĂ«sha|gosalaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalazroshĂ«sha|gokisalazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salazromusha|salazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalaznkromusha|gosalaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazromusha|gokisalazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazmunĂŒsha|salazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalaznkmunĂŒsha|gosalaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazmunĂŒsha|gokisalazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:salazmushĂ«sha|salazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalaznkmushĂ«sha|gosalaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalazmushĂ«sha|gokisalazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazmurosha|salazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalaznkmurosha|gosalaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazmurosha|gokisalazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:salaz|salaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠz|sĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosalaz|hosalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠlĂŠz|hosĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosalaz|hohosalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠlĂŠz|hohosĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsalaz|nĂŒsalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠlĂŠz|nĂŒsĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsalaz|nĂŒnĂŒsalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠlĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsalaz|nĂŻsalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠlĂŠz|nĂŻsĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsalaz|nĂŻnĂŻsalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠlĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusalaz|lusalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠlĂŠz|lusĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusalaz|lulusalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠlĂŠz|lulusĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisalaz|lisalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠlĂŠz|lisĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisalaz|lilisalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠlĂŠz|lilisĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosalaz|kosalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠlĂŠz|kosĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosalaz|kokosalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠlĂŠz|kokosĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesalaz|kesalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠlĂŠz|kesĂŠlĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesalaz|kekesalaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠlĂŠz|kekesĂŠlĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
